de.builder.scene_placeholder: Beschreibe deine Szene… z.B. 'A detective stands in a rain-soaked alley, collar raised, breath visible in cold air'
de.builder.neg_custom_placeholder: Komma-getrennt: z.B. text, logo, extra limbs
de.builder.random_mode_beat_title: Beat — würfelt nur das Szenen-Textfeld (Setting, Subjekt, Aktion, Stimmung). Chips bleiben unverändert.
de.builder.random_mode_look_title: Look — würfelt nur die visuellen Chips (Style, Kamera, Lens, Licht, Color Grade…). Szene bleibt.
de.builder.random_mode_full_title: Full Scene — würfelt Szene UND Chips. Kompletter Reset mit neuen Feldern.
de.builder.prompt_placeholder: Wähle Optionen links um deinen Prompt zu bauen…
de.builder.rules_toggle_title: Die 6 NanoBanana Core-Regeln für Prompt-Optimierung ein-/ausklappen
de.grid.ref_hint: Referenzen direkt in NanoBanana hochladen — nicht hier.
de.grid.style_ph_sg: z.B. Neo-Noir Cinematic / Style Asset aus OpenArt
de.grid.core_subject_ph: z.B. 'abandoned Soviet factory, winter, blue dusk'
de.grid.custom_ph_suffix: Schreib deinen Prompt hier komplett manuell. Keine Einschränkungen, kein NanoBanana-Overlay.
de.grid.mode_seengrid_desc: SeenGrid Signature — exakte paste-ready Templates aus DeepSeek1.txt, gruppiert nach Kategorie
de.grid.mode_core_desc: Core (Default) — freier Grid mit NanoBanana-Optimierung, editierbare Panel-Rollen
de.grid.mode_custom_desc: Custom Grid — komplett manuell, kein Template, kein NanoBanana-Overlay. Du schreibst alles selbst.
de.mj.sub_tab_fields_desc: Szenen-Felder ausfüllen (Location, Licht, Dark, Emotional Hook)
de.mj.sub_tab_params_desc: Filmstock, Aspect Ratio und --raw Flag setzen
de.mj.hook_toggle_title: Emotional Hooks ein-/ausklappen — Quick-Pick für Stimmungs-Statements
de.mj.raw_toggle_title: --raw Flag an/aus — Pflicht: reduziert MJs Verschonerung
de.mj.random_mode_beat_title: Beat — würfelt nur narrative/inhaltliche Felder (Location, Objekt, Licht, Hook…). Setup und Film-Look bleiben.
de.mj.random_mode_look_title: Look — würfelt nur visuelle/stilistische Felder (Modifier, Genre, Filmstock, Aspect Ratio, Perspektive…). Szene bleibt.
de.mj.random_mode_full_title: Full Scene — würfelt alles inklusive Template. Kompletter Reset mit neuen Feldern.
de.vault.error_hint: Bitte prüfe ob du online bist. Die Prompts werden direkt von github.com/jau123/nanobanana-trending-prompts geladen.
de.vault.no_results: Keine Prompts für diese Suche / Kategorie gefunden.

en.tabs.builder.label: NanoBanana Studio
en.tabs.grid.label: Grid Operator
en.tabs.mj.label: Midjourney Studio
en.tabs.vault.label: Prompt Vault
en.builder.scene_placeholder: Describe your scene… e.g. 'A detective stands in a rain-soaked alley, collar raised, breath visible in cold air'
en.builder.neg_custom_placeholder: Comma-separated: e.g. text, logo, extra limbs
en.builder.random_mode_beat_title: Beat — rolls only the scene textarea (setting, subject, action, mood). Chips stay.
en.builder.random_mode_look_title: Look — rolls only visual chips (style, camera, lens, lighting, color grade…). Scene stays.
en.builder.random_mode_full_title: Full Scene — rolls scene AND chips. Complete reset with fresh fields.
en.builder.prompt_placeholder: Select options on the left to build your prompt…
en.builder.rules_toggle_title: Expand/collapse the 6 NanoBanana core rules for prompt optimization
en.grid.ref_hint: Upload references directly in NanoBanana — not entered here.
en.grid.style_ph_sg: e.g. Neo-Noir Cinematic / Style Asset from OpenArt
en.grid.core_subject_ph: e.g. 'abandoned Soviet factory, winter, blue dusk'
en.grid.custom_ph_suffix: Write your prompt here, completely manually. No constraints, no NanoBanana overlay.
en.grid.mode_seengrid_desc: SeenGrid Signature — exact paste-ready templates from DeepSeek1.txt, grouped by category
en.grid.mode_core_desc: Core (Default) — free grid with NanoBanana optimization, editable panel roles
en.grid.mode_custom_desc: Custom Grid — completely manual, no template, no NanoBanana overlay. You write everything yourself.
en.mj.step5_desc: Always at the end. --raw is required.
en.mj.sub_tab_fields_desc: Fill in the scene fields (location, light, dark, emotional hook)
en.mj.sub_tab_templates_desc: Pick a shot template and medium anchor (modifier + genre)
en.mj.sub_tab_params_desc: Set filmstock, aspect ratio and --raw flag
en.mj.hook_toggle_title: Expand/collapse emotional hooks — quick-pick for mood statements
en.mj.raw_toggle_title: Toggle --raw flag — mandatory: reduces MJ beautification
en.mj.random_mode_beat_title: Beat — rolls only narrative fields (location, object, light, hook…). Setup and film look stay.
en.mj.random_mode_look_title: Look — rolls only visual/stylistic fields (modifier, genre, filmstock, aspect ratio, perspective…). Scene stays.
en.mj.random_mode_full_title: Full Scene — rolls everything including the template. Complete reset with fresh fields.
en.vault.error_hint: Please check your internet connection. Prompts are loaded directly from github.com/jau123/nanobanana-trending-prompts.
en.vault.no_results: No prompts found for this search / category.
en.vault.subtitle: sorted by engagement
